name: Tabs
description: A set of layered sections of content — only one section is visible at a time

anatomy.tablist: The container element for the tab triggers (role=tablist)
anatomy.tabpanel: The content panel associated with a tab (role=tabpanel)
anatomy.indicator: The visual underline or highlight on the active tab

selected.description: Active tab — its tabpanel is visible

focused.description: Keyboard focus on a tab trigger

disabled.description: Tab is present but not activatable

keyboard.ArrowRight: Move focus to the next tab; wraps to first
keyboard.ArrowLeft: Move focus to the previous tab; wraps to last
keyboard.Home: Move focus to the first tab
keyboard.End: Move focus to the last tab
keyboard.Tab: Move focus into the active tabpanel
keyboard.Shift+Tab: Move focus back to the active tab from the tabpanel
keyboard.Enter: Activates the focused tab (if tabs are manually activated)
keyboard.Space: Activates the focused tab (if tabs are manually activated)

variants.boxed: Tabs with a bordered box around the tablist
